title: isoetes elatior
intro: Isoetes elatior, also known as quillwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Isoetaceae and is commonly found in freshwater environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of quillwort include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Quillwort can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
